series_metadata.series_description: Files that contain all records associated with appeals filed by consumers because of the provision or denial of a service. Record may include: copies of consumer case records, correspondence, letters regarding appeals, hearing records, log records, database files and supporting documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Appeal files are maintained in either an active or closed status. Closed consumer appeal files are maintained for three (3) federal fiscal years after the appeal is closed. An RC-3 is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Appeal files are maintained in either an active or closed status. Closed consumer appeal files are maintained for three (3) federal fiscal years after the appeal is closed. An RC-3 is required when destroying these records., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
